title: Automating Monday workflows

posts.author: mikaoffillout (Mika)
posts.cookedHtml:
Good news! Monday users who create forms, surveys, and questionnaires can now automate their workflows with Fillout. Hi, I’m Mika, and I’m part of the Fillout team. Last year, we launched our integration, which lets users create new entries or update existing items in their Monday board every time a form is submitted.

Here’s what you can automate:
Summarize form submissions
Send custom emails after form submission or if a condition is met
Classify and route submissions
Send reminders to meeting hosts and invitees
Follow up with leads
Send Slack/Teams/Discord messages
Send webhooks

and more.

How to do it:

  1. Create a form in Fillout or open an existing one.
  2. Integrate it with Monday.
  3. Choose a workflow.

Our Free tier lets you receive up to 1,000 submissions per month. Feel free to let me know if you have any questions!
